messages.content: Runtime orchestrator: Rust with axum. Inference runtime: separate Python/Torch OpenAI-compatible service. Serving model family: local scratch dense decoder. Training scale: `scratch-60m`, targeting 50-80M parameters. Training method: local PyTorch from random initialization. Tokenizer: local byte-level BPE. Memory backend: SQLite plus FTS lexical retrieval. Agent loop limit: `AGENT_MAX_STEPS=6`.
